description: Foundation spacing scale for all Sentient OS ecosystem layouts.
rule: No arbitrary spacing values. All layout spacing must use Foundation spacing tokens.

tokens.usage: Tight icon gaps, compact inline spacing, and dense operational detail.
Small control padding and close related UI groupings.
Compact panel padding and metric label spacing.
Default component padding and standard content rhythm.
Card spacing, section gaps, and comfortable reading surfaces.
Panel interiors, page-header spacing, and structural separation.
Major section spacing and prominent layout breaks.
Large workspace breathing room and executive density layouts.
Full-screen section divisions and spacious overview compositions.
